'''Kassa''' was the first [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] the [[Binary star/Legends|binary stars]] [[Adega Prime]] and [[Adega Besh]] in the [[Adega system/Legends|Adega system]]. Located in the [[Auril sector/Legends|Auril sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]], it was a searing rock.

{{Planet-stub}}
